calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Assets Of Trust Estate
Off Calendar Jul-23-2014 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Wallis Lim for Alvin Lee (Trustee).

The court expressed concern that the property is not on schedule A, that title has not been changed, that there is no pour-over will, and notice. Mr. Lim stated that the pour-over will cannot be found, that Mr. Lee had a sister who is deceased with no issue. The court denied the petition for order confirming assets of trust estate, stating that it does not see a legal basis for granting the petition.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)
